data.title: Binance Recognized Among Top Fintech Innovators in 2025
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, highlighting Binance's recognition as one of the top companies in the Digital Assets category of CNBC’s 2025 World’s Top Fintech Companies list. This annual list, compiled by CNBC and Statista, acknowledges 300 leading fintech companies across seven market segments, emphasizing Binance's significant role in advancing blockchain solutions and promoting digital-asset adoption on a global scale. The Digital Assets category, which includes blockchain, cryptocurrency, and NFT platforms, showcases innovators who are shaping the future of finance. Now in its third year, the list celebrates companies making a substantial impact on the global financial landscape.

The World’s Top Fintech Companies list is independently compiled by CNBC and Statista, a global leader in market research and rankings. The selection process is based on independent journalistic criteria and rigorous evaluation, offering both consumers and businesses trusted insights into industry leaders. Statista, with over 100 expert analysts and partnerships with 45 leading media brands worldwide, ensures the rankings are transparent and reliable. This recognition provides companies like Binance with acknowledgment that genuinely reflects their contributions to the fintech and blockchain sectors.

To determine the 300 honorees, CNBC and Statista assessed a combination of publicly available data and company submissions collected between February and May 2025. The evaluation process weighted metrics reflecting growth, reach, and reputation at 40%, while segment-specific variables, which measure innovation and performance within each category, carried a 60% weight. This methodology ensures that companies excelling in both scale and specialized innovation rise to the top of the list.

Securing a top position in the Digital Assets segment underscores Binance’s responsible leadership and innovation in the blockchain industry. This recognition validates Binance's commitment to compliance, advancing blockchain education, and developing products that empower users. It also highlights Binance's global reach and dedication to making digital assets more accessible, secure, and impactful for users worldwide.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed GameSquare acquires Compound founder's CryptoPunk #5577 for $5.15 million in preferred shares
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed GameSquare Holdings (NASDAQ: GAME) announced that it would acquire CryptoPunk #5577 held by Robert Leshner, the founder of DeFi protocol Compound, for $5.15 million in preferred shares. It is reported that this is GameSquare's first direct investment in NFT.
GameSquare currently holds approximately 12,913.49 ETH, and the total value of Ethereum assets is approximately US$52 million. (Chainwire)

data.title: Could Crypto Bets Serve as a "Powell Play" Hedge?
data.description:
As speculation grows over President Trump’s potential dismissal of Fed Chair Jerome Powell, markets are rattled by fears of politicized monetary policy, a weaker dollar, and rising inflation, with crypto emerging as both a hedge and a high-volatility play.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/07/24/could-crypto-bets-serve-as-a-powell-play-hedge/

data.title: Binance Interviews: Internet Computer (ICP) Unveils 2025 Vision: Self-Writing Internet, Sovereign AI, and Chain Fusion for Bitcoin DeFi
data.description: Key Takeaways:ICP introduces the Self-Writing Internet through apps like Caffeine, enabling AI-powered, fully on-chain app development.Its Sovereign Cloud architecture supports end-to-end decentralized infrastructure and trustless on-chain AI.Chain Fusion allows native integration with Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana, driving secure, bridgeless DeFi.The Internet Computer (ICP), developed by the DFINITY Foundation, is reimagining decentralized infrastructure with a multi-pronged vision: the Self-Writing Internet, sovereign on-chain AI, and seamless cross-chain interoperability via Chain Fusion. In this exclusive Binance News interview, Chief Business Officer Pierre Samaties and Chief Technology Officer Jan Camenisch share how ICP’s 2025–2026 roadmap aligns with the evolution of Web3.1. The Self-Writing Internet1: What is the vision behind the “Self-Writing Internet,” and how does it connect to ICP’s canister smart contract architecture and fully on-chain dApps?The Self-Writing Internet (SWI) enables anyone to build and deploy full-stack applications without coding. Powered by AI, the Caffeine platform generates app logic and deploys it directly to ICP's sovereign infrastructure. Every deployment runs on-chain within canister smart contracts, using compute cycles paid in burned ICP tokens. This aligns the self-writing paradigm with ICP’s tokenomics and decentralized compute architecture.2: Which applications on ICP are currently leading the way in adopting this self-writing paradigm? What does real-world usage and performance look like today?Caffeine is leading the charge, enabling both technical and non-technical users to build applications through natural language. At its San Francisco hackathon, participants created real-world tools such as HIPAA-compliant medical apps, legal document generators, and civic tools. These early use cases validate the robustness of ICP's infrastructure.3: How does the ICP stack enable developers to host both frontends and backends entirely on-chain? How does this compare — in speed, cost, and UX — to traditional cloud and Layer-2 setups?ICP hosts frontend, backend, and data within canister smart contracts. It achieves sub-second finality, supports over 770,000 TPS (Ethereum-equivalent), and offers a gasless UX through its reverse-gas model. Apps are served via HTTPS with Web2-like authentication. Chain Fusion also enables bridgeless cross-chain actions, eliminating centralized points of failure.4: What tooling or protocol upgrades are planned in 2025 to simplify onboarding and accelerate adoption of fully on-chain apps, particularly for Web2 developers?Key initiatives include Caffeine for no-code AI app development and ICP.Ninja, a web-based IDE with templates for Web2 developers. Recent Niobium upgrades introduced vetKeys for confidential data, while upcoming Flux and Pulse milestones will improve scalability and UX for Internet Identity.5: How is ICP enabling the creation of apps that are not only decentralized, but also censorship-resistant, autonomously upgradable, and self-evolving over time?ICP uniquely allows full-stack sovereignty—apps are owned and governed by users, DAOs, or even autonomously. No part of the stack depends on centralized infrastructure, offering true resistance to censorship and external interference.2. Sovereign Clouds, Apps, and AI6: ICP is described as a “sovereign cloud.” How does this architecture differ from traditional cloud or modular Layer-2 platforms in terms of autonomy, scalability, and trust minimization?ICP decentralizes the entire infrastructure stack through independently owned nodes hosted globally. Chain-key cryptography enables unbounded scalability, with subnets validating messages efficiently. Unlike Ethereum rollups or L2s, ICP doesn't rely on centralized cloud components.7: How is ICP uniquely positioned to support AI models running entirely on-chain?ICP smart contracts can store up to 500GB and run AI models directly on-chain. It ensures trustless training and execution, addressing the AI "black box" problem. Data privacy is preserved via smart contract-controlled access.8: Can you share a real-world example of an AI model currently deployed via ICP canisters?ICP supports LLMs with up to 1B parameters and is building AI Workers—nodes with preloaded models that smart contracts can invoke. Outputs are validated via consensus, ensuring trust while minimizing latency.9: What does the roadmap look like for decentralized AI in 2025–2026?ICP will expand AI Worker support, introduce fine-tuning and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and enable smart contracts to use AI agents. Canister Interface Descriptions (CanID) and inter-canister calls support service discovery and monetization.10: How is the developer ecosystem evolving on ICP?Motoko and Rust remain core, with TypeScript support approaching. ICP.Ninja and Caffeine simplify onboarding. Caffeine democratizes development by allowing anyone to build apps via AI interaction.3. Chain Fusion and Bitcoin DeFi11: How does ICP’s Chain Key cryptography enable seamless interoperability with Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana?ICP enables native blockchain integrations without bridges or custodians. Canisters can create Bitcoin addresses, read/write to Bitcoin, and sign transactions on-chain. Ethereum and Solana integrations are already live; BNB Chain is on the roadmap.12: What’s ckBTC’s current adoption and use within ICP’s DeFi ecosystem?ckBTC is the fourth most transacted Bitcoin derivative. Apps like Liquidium, Odin.fun, Kairos, and KongSwap are building Bitcoin-native DeFi on ICP, enabled by ckBTC's seamless performance and security.13: What is the timeline for outbound calls to more blockchains?Outbound calls to Ethereum and Solana are live. Support for EVM-compatible chains is expanding. Dogecoin integration (Meridian milestone) is upcoming, enabling more native asset interactions.14: How will Chain Fusion evolve by 2026?Chain Fusion aims to abstract blockchain complexity, allowing canisters to execute logic across chains and Web2 APIs. The goal is a seamless DeFi Singularity where users interact with all assets from a single interface.15: Are there any strategic partnerships to accelerate cross-chain development?ICP is in a strategic partnership with Binance and building ties with Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana ecosystems. These partnerships drive adoption of Chain Fusion and the Self-Writing Internet.4. Vision, Governance & Ecosystem Outlook16: How is the Network Nervous System (NNS) evolving to support this new era?NNS is the largest DAO globally, with over $1.5B in staked ICP and 14,000+ proposals. UI upgrades are planned to improve UX and attract more non-technical participants. Community-owned SNS DAOs also continue to grow.16: What’s your outlook on ICP tokenomics?ICP has a 100% circulating supply, 40% staked, with 27% locked for 8 years. Compute cycles burn ICP, driving deflation as usage scales. Projects like Waterneuron enable liquid staking, and Caffeine is set to expand token utility.17: What advice would you give developers deciding between ICP and modular ecosystems like Celestia or Ethereum rollups?ICP isn’t just a competitor—it’s a powerful complement. Developers can build fully sovereign, interoperable apps and tap into Chain Fusion, all while remaining in their native ecosystem.18: In one sentence: What is the Internet Computer in 2025, and what’s its most transformative role by 2030?In 2025, ICP powers the Self-Writing Internet where anyone can build apps via AI; by 2030, it becomes the Fluid Internet—where apps adapt in real time to user interaction.

data.title: BNB Chain Accelerates Real-World Asset Development with Circle's USYC Launch
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, BNB Chain announced on July 24 that the development of real-world assets (RWA) on its platform is rapidly advancing. Circle's interest-bearing stablecoin, USYC, backed by U.S. Treasury bonds, will be natively issued on BNB Chain. This initiative aims to significantly enhance capital efficiency for global users, allowing them to earn returns, maintain liquidity, increase transaction speed, and support operations across the entire chain.

With the native issuance of USYC on BNB Chain, users can achieve several benefits:

- Continuously generate returns while using it as collateral.

- Convert to USDC at nearly instantaneous speeds.

- Seamlessly access existing tokenized real-world assets within the ecosystem.

Circle's USYC is set to launch soon, bringing near-instant liquidity and continuous returns to BNB Chain. This development is expected to drive an intelligent upgrade of decentralized finance (DeFi) experiences.

data.title: Ethereum Sets Record for Daily Gas Usage in July 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum's daily gas usage reached an all-time high of 149,673,860,000 on July 21, 2025. This milestone highlights the ongoing growth and vitality of the Ethereum ecosystem, with increasing on-chain applications, users, and real-world value. The rising gas consumption reflects genuine market demand and adoption trends.

data.title: Anchorage Digital Partners with Ethena Labs to Launch USDtb, the First GENIUS-Compliant, Federally Regulated Stablecoin
data.description: Anchorage Digital announced a strategic partnership with Ethena Labs to launch USDtb, the first stablecoin in the United States with a GENIUS Act compliance path. As the only federally chartered crypto bank in the United States, Anchorage Digital will issue USDtb in the United States through its stablecoin issuance platform, helping institutional clients access digital dollars in a compliant and secure manner. (Business Wire)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 770 USDT with a Narrowed 2.13% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 24, 2025, 13:35 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 770 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 770.52002 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.13% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Spirit Blockchain Capital Unveils New Strategy and Entity
data.description:
According to Odaily, Canadian digital asset management and investment firm Spirit Blockchain Capital has announced the launch of its Spirit Blockchain 2.0 strategy. This initiative aims to integrate a multi-token investment portfolio into its revenue strategy, with plans to expand its earnings program to include Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL) in the fourth quarter of this year.

Additionally, Spirit Blockchain Capital has officially established a new entity, SpiritReserve Group. The company plans to raise up to $500 million in phases, focusing on strategic investments in the digital asset sector to enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Bitmine's Ethereum Holdings Surpass $2 Billion
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitmine has updated its Ethereum holdings on the X platform. As of 11:59 PM Eastern Time on July 23, 2025 (11:59 AM UTC+8), Bitmine holds a total of 566,776 ETH, valued at over $2 billion.

data.title: Binance to Host Discord AMA with Rewards for Participants
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the ongoing Binance 8YA celebrations will feature a special Discord AMA session. This event will highlight success stories from Community Associates, Angels, and Content Creators. Participants will have the opportunity to ask questions and potentially win rewards. The AMA is scheduled for 2025-07-25 at 15:00 (UTC).

Participants in the AMA can win $150 worth of Red Packets and Binance SWAG. To be eligible, users must join the AMA and look out for Red Packet codes shared during the session. These codes offer a chance to split $100 in USDC. Additionally, users who ask insightful questions using the hashtag #BinanceAMA in the #global-chat can win rewards. Binance will select 10 winners to receive $5 in USDC each. For Binance SWAG, the top three participants on the Kahoot quiz leaderboard at the end of the AMA will win exclusive items.

Only users who have completed identity verification (KYC) are eligible for rewards. Winners will be announced in the #discord-news channel within a day after the event. Unclaimed Red Packets will be distributed to winners' Spot Accounts within 14 business days. Winners of Binance SWAG must contact the activity manager within a week to arrange delivery, which may take up to 30 business days. In case of delivery restrictions, winners will receive a Red Packet of equivalent value. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants for fraudulent behavior or interference with program operations. The company may also amend terms and conditions at its discretion.

data.title: Circle to Launch Interest-Bearing Stablecoin USYC on BNB Chain
data.description: According to PANews, Circle is set to introduce its interest-bearing stablecoin, USYC, on the BNB Chain. This stablecoin is backed by U.S. Treasury assets and aims to enhance capital efficiency for global users. The launch is expected to facilitate yield generation, maintain liquidity, and improve transaction speed, all while being operable across the blockchain.

data.title: OG bitcoin wallet from 2011 moves 3,962 BTC worth over $460M after 14 years of dormancy
data.description:
A 2011 bitcoin wallet just reactivated, moving 3,962 BTC now worth $468 M, shortly after other whales shifted more than 90,000 bitcoin to new addresses.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/364112/decade-bitcoin-wallet-address-whale?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
